# Solvor Paints — llms.txt
# Solvor General Trading & Investments Company Limited
# https://solvorpaints.com/

## About
Solvor General Trading & Investments Company Limited is a legally registered paint manufacturer and construction company in South Sudan (Registration No: COY-WBS78Y, TIN: B202405135KDX3E), operating under the Ministry of Justice and Constitutional Affairs. Headquartered in Jebel, Gudele, Juba, Solvor delivers premium paint products and construction services across South Sudan and East Africa.

## Products
- Vinyl Silk Emulsion: Luxury satin-finish interior wall paint. Anti-bacterial, ultra-low VOC. Coverage ~12 m²/L (2 coats).
- Matt Emulsion: Water-based acrylic for interior walls, ceilings and boards. Coverage ~10–14 m²/L.
- Weatherguard Matt: High-performance pure acrylic exterior paint. Algae, dust and UV resistant. Coverage ~8–10 m²/L.
- Undercoat: 2-in-1 primer for interior and exterior masonry. Coverage ~10–12 m²/L.
- Textured Paint / Archi-Texture Graffiato: Decorative textured finish for walls.
- Non-Priming Roofing Paint: Alkyd-based for galvanised iron, aluminium and asbestos sheets.
- Binder: Zero VOC copolymer to improve adhesion in water-based paints.
- Available in 200+ decorative colours.

## Services
- Painting: Interior and exterior painting for residential, commercial and industrial clients.
- Paint Supply: Trade and retail supply of the full Solvor paint range.
- Welding & Steel Works: Custom gates, railings, security fencing, structural fabrication.
- Doors: Steel, aluminium and glass panel doors, custom fabrication and installation.
- Glass & Aluminium: Clear, tinted and frosted glass, aluminium windows, curtain wall glazing.
- General Construction: Residential and commercial builds, fit-outs, plastering, tiling, project management.

## Service Locations
Juba (headquarters), Renk, Hai Malakal, Bentiu, Wau State, Rumbek, Aweil, Warrap — and East African countries including Uganda and Kenya.

## Contact
Phone: +211 980 373 157

Address: Jebel, Gudele, Juba, South Sudan
Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
